title: Create Better Baking
description: Overhauls minecraft's baking system to be integrated with create.
body: ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1466039/description_7bb157ba-8093-4978-a6ad-8d1ce01a054a.png) THIS IS REMAKE OF THE [OLD VERSION](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-better-baking-legacy). Adds a complex system of baking to create, allowing for cakes to made cheaper but more complicated. The new system for baking includes:    -Cake pans    -Cake batter    -Multi-Block Baking    -Block Spouting   COMMING SOON     -Other baking recipes (eg. chocolate cake, cookies, bread, ect).     -Ponders.
